title: How an astrophysicist uses Codex to help simulate black holes
summary: 天体物理学家Chi-kwan Chan利用OpenAI的Codex工具构建黑洞模拟，帮助科学家研究极端物理现象并检验爱因斯坦的广义相对论。
highlights: How an astrophysicist uses Codex to help simulate black holes
Chi-kwan Chan uses Codex to build black hole simulations
helping scientists study extreme physics and test Einstein’s theory of general relativity
